title: Critical: Authentication Bypass on Mobile Login
description: Security vulnerability detected where users can bypass OTP verification.

title: UI Bug: Navigation Bar Overlapping Content
description: On smaller screens, the sticky header covers the top section of the page.

title: API: Stripe Webhook Failing to Process Payments
description: Payment successful in Stripe but ticket status not updating in DB.

title: Feature Request: Bulk Ticket Export (CSV/PDF)
description: Admins need to download monthly reports for all resolved tickets.

title: Performance: Excessive Database Queries on Load
description: Dashboard is making 50+ API calls, causing high server latency.

title: Assets: Broken Images in Customer Profile
description: Uploaded profile pictures are returning 403 Forbidden errors.

title: Enhancement: Add Dark Mode Toggle in Settings
description: User requested a persistent dark/light mode switcher.

title: Internal Error: WebSocket Connection Dropped
description: Real-time ticket updates stop working after 5 minutes of inactivity.

title: Accessibility: Missing Alt Tags on Dashboard Icons
description: Screen readers cannot identify the status icons correctly.

title: Refactor: Update Tailwind Config to v4.0
description: Modernize the styling configuration for better build performance.

title: Bug: Pagination Not Working on Ticket List
description: Clicking page 2 always redirects to the home page.

title: Email: Welcome Mail Going to Spam Folder
description: Need to configure SPF and DKIM records for the mail server.

title: Design: Update Font to Inter for Better Readability
description: The current font looks blurry on low-resolution monitors.

title: Backend: Memory Leak in Ticket Search API
description: Server RAM usage increases linearly with every search request.

title: Integration: Slack Notification for New Tickets
description: Send a message to #support channel whenever a high priority ticket is created.
